22.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
22.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

full, integrity, perfect(-ion), simplicity, upright(-ly, -ness), at a venture. See H8550 (תֻּמִּים).

23.kj: body, bone, [idiom] life, (self-) same, strength, [idiom] very.

23.gl: tranquil; (in a bad sense) careless; abstractly, security
23.kj: (being) at ease, peaceable, (in) prosper(-ity), quiet(-ness), wealthy.

24.gl: a bone (as strong); by extension, the body; figuratively, the substance, i.e. (as pron.) selfsame
24.kj: body, bone, [idiom] life, (self-) same, strength, [idiom] very.

24.gl: a receptacle (for milk, i.e. pail; figuratively, breast)
